allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import django; print\(f'Django {django.VERSION}'\); import rest_framework; print\(f'DRF {rest_framework.VERSION}'\); import celery; print\(f'Celery {celery.__version__}'\); import pandas; print\(f'Pandas {pandas.__version__}'\); import langchain; print\(f'LangChain {langchain.__version__}'\)")
